description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a light gray, wood-textured top and sturdy metal legs. The legs are angled and connected at the base, providing stability and a contemporary appearance. The desk features a modesty panel along the back, which adds structural support and privacy for the user. The surface is flat and spacious, suitable for writing, working on a laptop, or other office tasks. The materials and design suggest durability and suitability for high-traffic environments. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or other attachments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional style.
description: A modern, rectangular desk with a light gray wood-textured top, angled metal legs, and a modesty panel for support and privacy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat desk surface, angled metal legs, and open leg space beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the tabletop and the angular design of the metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the modesty panel running along the back and the full width of the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same angular leg structure and slim tabletop profile.
attribute_orientation: The side with open leg space and no modesty panel is intended to face the user, while the modesty panel marks the back.
